color: rgb(30, 41, 59) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
WindowBlockManager
manages one (numKvHeads, windowSize) pool
kvCacheManager.h L536

div.style: color: rgb(30, 41, 59) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
PrefixReuseTree
mCachedBlocksRoot (sentinel, id=-1)
radix trie via templatedTrie.h
nodes = KVCacheBlock, edges labeled by BlockKey

div.style: color: rgb(30, 41, 59) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
KVCacheBlockPool
mPools — one pool per cache tier
primaryPtr → GPU tensor
secondaryPtr → CPU pinned tensor
shape: max blocks × layers × 2 × heads × tokens per block × head dim

div.style: color: rgb(30, 41, 59) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
LRUEvictionPolicy
evictionPolicy.h L71
mFreeQueues[cacheLevel][priority]
priority 0–100; mDurationMs → expiry
getFreeBlock() / releaseBlock() / claimBlock()

div.style: color: rgb(30, 41, 59) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
KVCacheTransferManager
offload(block) → copies block from GPU to CPU
onboard(block) → streams block back to GPU
triggered on memory pressure / cache hit

div.style: color: rgb(30, 41, 59) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
mAllBlocksById
flat list of all blocks indexed by block ID
constant-time block lookup
owns all KVCacheBlock instances

div.style: color: rgb(30, 41, 59) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Reuse Policy Flags
mEnablePartialReuse — allow sub-block token matching
mCopyOnPartialReuse — copy vs steal on partial hit
mEnableCrossKvCacheReuse — share across requests
